items.claim: Conor McGregor has not spent the last five years training and growing as an athlete.
items.quote: you know those five years weren't spent training and growing as an athlete. He wasn't living like an athlete.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's performance in his second fight against Dustin Poirier indicated his prime was over five and a half years ago.
items.quote: if you watch that second Porier fight, you're like, 'Oh my god, it was over five and a half years ago.'
Max obviously known for being incredibly durable.

items.claim: Max Holloway possesses elite cardio and high striking volume.
Conor McGregor is not a particularly good wrestler.
items.quote: he's not a particularly good wrestler

items.claim: Conor McGregor does not care about fighting at this stage of his career.
items.quote: He doesn't care about fighting at this stage. He cares about money and building his business.

items.claim: Max Holloway's calf kicks could present issues for Conor McGregor.
items.quote: I think the calf kicks are something that Max Holloway has that could present some issues

items.claim: Max Holloway has a more diverse striking style than Conor McGregor.
items.quote: I just think Max has a more diverse striking style

items.claim: Max Holloway will have a better chin at 170 pounds.
items.quote: we're up at 170. He's going to have a better chin at this point.
